human_goal: Prepare a short launch note for a demo product update without sending it.

context.approved_brief: A small team wants a plain launch note that says what changed, why it helps, and what the reader can try next.
context.audience: People already using the product who want a quick, useful update.
context.boundary: Use only this demo brief. Do not use client names, private history, account details, or live market claims.

memory_candidates.content: Launch notes should be short, plain, and action-oriented.
